properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v5 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Blessed Assurance, Jesus is mine, He's been my fourth man in the fire, time after time, Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood, And what He did for me on Calvary is more than enough.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I trust in God, my Savior, The one who will never fail, He will never fail, I trust in God, my Savior, The one who will never fail, He will never fail,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Perfect submission, all is at rest, I know the author of tomorrow has ordered my steps, So this is my story and this is my song, I'm praising my risen King and Savior all the day long.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He didn't fail you then, He won't fail you now.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, That's why I trust Him, that's why I trust Him.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, That's why I trust Him.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: That's why I trust in God, my Savior, The one who will never fail, He will never fail, Oh, I trust in God, my Savior, The one who will never fail, He will never fail, I sought the Lord.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord (and He delivered me from all my fears), I sought the Lord (from everything), And He heard and He answered, oh, That's why I trust Him, that's why I trust Him.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, I sought the Lord and He heard and He answered, That's why I trust Him, that's why I trust in God.
